_description: Template for recording a CAPEX cost data point for green hydrogen projects. Copy this file, replace placeholder values, and save to the appropriate cost category folder under /knowledge_base/cost_library/.
_instructions: 2. Replace all <<PLACEHOLDER>> values with cost data from authoritative sources
3. Always specify cost_year, cost_basis, and confidence level
4. If extrapolating from a different scale, document the method
5. Link to a specific project_reference_id when the cost is from a real project
6. For industry benchmarks (IEA, IRENA), cite the specific report and page
7. Explicitly list exclusions to prevent misuse in CAPEX aggregation
cost_name: <<PEM Electrolyzer Stack — Installed Cost — 100 MW Plant — Europe 2024>>
cost_subcategory: PEM Stack (membrane, electrodes, bipolar plates, assembly)

confidence.rationale: <<Based on audited actual installed cost from EPC close-out report. Cost breakdown verified by owner's engineer. Covers stack, auxiliaries, and installation labor.>>

primary_drivers: Iridium price and loading per kW
cost_drivers.regional_multiplier_notes: <<Based on European supply chain. China: estimated −20–30%. North America: +5–15%. MENA: similar to Europe if imported, lower if localized.>>
exclusions: Freight and import duties (included in BOP indirect costs)
Installation supervision by OEM (included in EPC indirect)

sources.title: <<Project Alpha — EPC Close-Out Report, Appendix C: Equipment Cost Breakdown, Confidential>>
<<IRENA Green Hydrogen Cost Reduction: Scaling up Electrolysers, 2024 Update — Figure 3.2: PEM Stack Cost Breakdown>>

rag_metadata.text_for_embedding: PEM Electrolyzer Stack — Installed Cost — 100 MW Plant — Europe 2024. Category: electrolyzer_stack > PEM Stack (membrane, electrodes, bipolar plates, assembly). EUR/kW: 650 (range 500–850). Basis: installed_cost. Year: 2024. Technology: PEM. Scale: 100 MW. Confidence: a_actual_cost — based on audited EPC close-out report. Cost drivers: Iridium price, PFSA membrane cost, titanium manufacturing, stack manufacturing scale, OEM competition. Exclusions: freight, spare parts, extended warranty, OEM installation supervision. Keywords: PEM, electrolyzer stack, installed cost, 100MW, Europe, 2024, actual cost.
